title: Crewman-cadet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Crewman-cadets''' were officer candidates for the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] within the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] system. Their training normally took one year in a [[Sector Naval Academy]], at the end of which they were commissioned as [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenants]].

Training at the central [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval Academy]], however, lasted thirty months.
